blended.narrative: Loon Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 14 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 46°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 6" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect powder.
